metadata.defaultTitle: KnockOdds | MMA News, Odds, Fighters and Predictions
metadata.defaultDescription: Your #1 source for MMA news. Full coverage of UFC, Bellator, PFL: events, fighter profiles, technical analysis and more.

home.aboutP1: KnockOdds is your go-to source for everything related to mixed martial arts. We cover every UFC, Bellator, PFL and ONE Championship event with in-depth analysis, detailed fighter profiles and the latest MMA news.
home.aboutP2: Our team of specialized analysts and journalists provides unbiased, data-driven coverage of every fight, from main events to preliminary bouts.
home.aboutFeature1: Real-time coverage of all MMA events
home.aboutFeature2: Complete profiles with statistics of 5,000+ fighters
home.aboutFeature3: Technical analysis powered by artificial intelligence

bookmakers.title: Best Bookmakers for UFC and MMA
bookmakers.metaTitle: Best UFC and MMA Bookmakers {year} | Comparison and Reviews
bookmakers.description: Complete comparison of the best bookmakers for UFC and MMA. Detailed reviews, bonuses, odds and available markets.

bet365.description: Bet365 is the world's largest bookmaker and offers extremely comprehensive MMA coverage with the most betting markets available.
pros: Early odds release before other bookmakers
cons: Less generous bonus compared to competitors
bet365.verdict: Bet365 is perfect for experienced bettors who want the widest variety of markets and advanced features like cash out and live statistics.

unibet.description: Unibet is a trusted European bookmaker with solid MMA coverage and a user-friendly platform.
pros: Competitive odds on UFC main events
unibet.verdict: Unibet is an excellent choice for casual bettors who value simplicity and reliability.

betway.description: Betway offers competitive MMA odds and a clean betting experience with good promotional offers.
pros: Competitive odds across all MMA events
Wide event coverage: UFC, Bellator, PFL, ONE
betway.verdict: Betway is ideal for bettors looking for competitive odds and a polished betting experience.

888sport.description: 888Sport is a well-established bookmaker with a good selection of MMA markets and fair odds.
cons: Fewer MMA markets than top competitors
888sport.verdict: 888Sport is a solid pick for bettors who appreciate straightforward betting with fair odds.

bwin.description: bwin is one of Europe's most recognized betting brands, offering extensive MMA coverage and competitive promotions.
bwin.verdict: bwin is a reliable choice for European bettors wanting comprehensive MMA coverage from a trusted brand.

predictions.eventMetaDesc: {event} predictions and betting tips. AI-powered fight picks, odds comparison across bookmakers and value bets for every bout on the card.
predictions.fightMetaDesc: {fighter1} vs {fighter2}: expert prediction, best odds across bookmakers and betting tips for {event}. AI-driven fight analysis, style breakdown and value bets.
